description_for_human: Public HTTP endpoints for AI agents to publish content, upload files, send notifications — no auth required.
description_for_model: Use agent-write-apis when you need to publish output to the outside world without credentials. Available actions: (1) paste text to paste.rs, dpaste, rentry, termbin, paste.gg; (2) publish full articles to telegra.ph or write.as; (3) send push notifications via ntfy.sh; (4) upload files permanently to catbox.moe or temporarily to litterbox/file.io/transfer.sh; (5) store JSON at npoint.io or jsonbin.io. Use the Python Publisher class for automatic fallback. Companion project for LLM inference: https://github.com/efekurucay/immortal-agent
